title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
